title: Deserters Camps
description: The Deserters have settled camps around the world. Do you have the strength to take them down?
body:
![Deserters Camps Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0784cff78cf3521ca07c113130d13be84a9f13d9_0.webp)

Deserters Camps is a structure datapack that adds 3 type of camps for the illager deserters with many different biome variant.

The Deserters are a group of soldiers who fled the long-lost Villager-Illager War.

## Structures
This datapack adds 18 different structure to your world.

**Oak, Spruce, Acacia Camps**
- Small-sized Camp
- Medium-sized Camp
- Big-sized Camp

**Birch, Jungle, Dark Oak Camps**
- Small-sized Camp
- Medium-sized Camp

More variant will be added soon.
